items.summary: Add backend support for Ripple Effect Stories: allow a post to optionally reference a parent post ID as its 'inspiration source', store a ripple chain map (parentPostId → [childPostIds]), and expose query functions to fetch the full ripple chain for any given post.

Build a Memory Jar UI: add a mason-jar bookmark icon to every PostCard that fills/animates when a post is saved. Create a dedicated Memory Jar profile section (accessible from the Profile page) displaying all saved posts in a cozy scrapbook grid layout with a vintage paper/warmth aesthetic. Show a count badge on the jar icon in the profile nav.

Update the main navigation (Header component) to include links to all five new features: Love Notes, Deed of the Day, Kindness Matches, and Memory Jar (Memory Jar also accessible from Profile). Ensure all new pages are registered as routes in App.tsx.

Build a Ripple Effect Stories UI: on each PostCard, show a 'This inspired me' button that opens a ripple post creation modal pre-linked to the parent deed. Display the ripple chain as a visual tree/timeline beneath the original post, showing how kindness spread from one deed to many.

Add backend support for Love Notes to Strangers: store anonymous positivity notes with a message body (max 280 chars), a timestamp, and a recipient principal chosen randomly from active users. Expose functions to send a note and fetch notes addressed to the calling user.

Build a Love Notes to Strangers page accessible from the main navigation: show a warm, romantic card UI where authenticated users can type and send an anonymous note. Display received notes in a scrollable inbox styled like sealed letter envelopes that open on click, revealing the message with a soft animation.

Add backend support for Deed of the Day Challenges: store a single daily challenge prompt (text, date, category) set by admins or auto-rotated from a curated list. Store user challenge completions linking a user principal, date, and their completion post ID. Expose query functions to get today's challenge and all completions for it.

Build a Deed of the Day Challenge page: display today's challenge prompt in a large, celebratory hero card with a countdown to the next day's challenge. Show a 'Accept & Complete' button that opens the post creation modal pre-filled with the challenge context. Below the hero, render a live community wall of everyone who has completed today's challenge with their deed posts, participant count, and a progress ring.

Add backend support for Kindness Matches: compute compatibility scores between users based on overlapping deed categories in their posts. Store match pairs with a score and a 'reason' text (e.g., 'You both love helping neighbours'). Expose a query for a user to retrieve their top 5 Kindness Matches.

Build a Kindness Matches page: display the current user's top 5 matched users as profile cards with a compatibility percentage, shared deed categories, and the reason they were matched. Include a 'Say Hello 👋' button on each card that initiates a message to that user. Style the page with a warm, heart-themed romantic aesthetic.

Add backend support for Memory Jars: allow users to save any post into their personal Memory Jar collection, store saved post references (postId, savedAt timestamp) per user, and expose query functions to add/remove a post from a jar and to fetch all jar contents for the calling user.
